title: endiandra havelii
intro: Endiandra havelii is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal Australian medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. Endiandra havelii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, and is also used in topical applications for its medicinal and protective properties.
